task_completion.description: Verify that a Standard AR Invoice has been created for the customer 'Joe Block'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'Invoice (Customer)' or 'AR Invoice' window in the iDempiere GUI with 'Joe Block' selected in the Business Partner field.

task_completion.description: Verify that the invoice contains a line item for 5 units of 'Oak Tree'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Invoice Line' tab showing the product 'Oak Tree' with a Quantity (Qty Entered/Invoiced) of 5.

task_completion.description: Verify that the AR Invoice has been completed.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Document Status field on the invoice showing 'Completed' (often represented by a specific icon or text 'CO'/'Completed' in iDempiere) and a calculated Grand Total.

task_completion.description: Verify that an incoming payment (AR Receipt) was processed using check number 'CHK-CYCLE-001' for the exact grand total of the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'Payment' window showing a receipt from 'Joe Block'. The 'Check No' or 'Document No' field must contain 'CHK-CYCLE-001', and the Payment Amount must exactly match the Grand Total of the previously created invoice.

task_completion.description: Verify that the payment is fully allocated to the invoice.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Payment Allocation' window showing the payment linked to the invoice, OR check the Invoice record showing 'Paid' equals the Grand Total, OR check the Payment record showing the 'Allocated' amount equals the 'Payment Amount'.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the iDempiere web GUI to perform the tasks.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the iDempiere web interface in a browser, not API testing tools (like Postman) or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent actually entered the required data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values 'Joe Block', 'Oak Tree', and 'CHK-CYCLE-001' should be visible inside the proper form fields of the iDempiere application, not just typed into a notepad or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use direct database SQL commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows showing psql or database prompts executing INSERT/UPDATE commands should be visible.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task is performed in the iDempiere ERP system (GardenWorld database). Customer/Business Partner must be 'Joe Block'. Product must be 'Oak Tree' (Qty: 5). The payment must be an AR Receipt with check number 'CHK-CYCLE-001'. The payment must be fully allocated to the invoice (the underlying system requires a minimum allocation score of 80 for success, meaning the payment must be properly linked to the invoice in the system).
